case_title: JOSEPH DEANDRA DOWELL VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC,INC

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DOWELL, JOSEPH DEANDRA DBA I AM THE MONEY MANAGEMENT 17-1037171 TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC,INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2023 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOWELL, JOSEPH DEANDRA DBA I AM THE MONEY MANAGEMENT 17-1037171 IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC,INC PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE HIS CLAIMS OF UNFAIR TREATMENT OR FAILURE TO REASONABLY ACCOMMODATE HIM AT THE HOUSING CLINIC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOWELL, JOSEPH DEANDRA DBA I AM THE MONEY MANAGEMENT 17-1037171
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOWELL, JOSEPH DEANDRA DBA I AM THE MONEY MANAGEMENT 17-1037171 AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC,INC
REMARK:RETURN EXHIBITS AT THE WINDOW TO PLAINTIFF (JOSEPH DEANDRA DOWELL)
